'''Ellis Robson''' (born 14 September 1998) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sr|pr}} or {{rlp|lf}} for the [[Barrow Raiders]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

He has spent time on loan from [[Warrington Wolves|Warrington]] at the [[Dewsbury Rams]], [[Widnes Vikings]], [[Rochdale Hornets]], [[Salford Red Devils]] and the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].

==Career==
===Warrington Wolves===
Robson made his Super League debut in round 11 of the [[Super League XXV results|2020 Super League season]] for the Wolves against [[Hull FC]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/warrington-vs-hull/teams/54477 |title=Starting Lineups - Warrington vs Hull |publisher=Sky Sports |date=4 September 2020}}</ref>

On 23 October 2020 it was announced that although Robson had previously signed with the [[Ottawa Aces]] for 2021, Ottawa agreed to waive the contract in order for Robson to remain at Warrington after being offered a two-year deal with his current club.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.warringtonguardian.co.uk/sport/18818621.ottawa-bound-ellis-robson-signs-warrington-wolves-contract/ |title=Ottawa bound Ellis Robson signs Warrington Wolves contract |publisher=Warrington Guardian |first=Mike |last=Parsons |date=23 October 2020}}</ref>

===Widnes Vikings (loan)===
On 22 April 2021 it was reported that he had signed for the [[Widnes Vikings]] in the RFL Championship on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=22 April 2021|accessdate=23 Apr 2021|title=Widnes sign Ellis Robson on loan from Warrington|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/widnes-sign-ellis-robson-on-loan-from-warrington/}}</ref> Robson made his 3rd loan debut for Widnes against the [[Batley Bulldogs]] on 24 Apr 2021.

===Salford Red Devils (loan)===
On 29 June 2021 he signed for the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]] on loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=29 June 2021|accessdate=29 Jun 2021|title=Salford sign forward Ellis Robson on loan from Warrington|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/salford-sign-forward-ellis-robson-on-loan-from-warrington/}}</ref>

===Keighley Cougars===
On 28 September 2022 Robson signed for the [[Keighley Cougars]] in the RFL Championship on a two-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=28 September 2022|accessdate=28 Sep 2022|title=Former Warrington forward Ellis Robson makes Championship switch|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/former-warrington-forward-ellis-robson-makes-championship-switch/}}</ref>

===Barrow Raiders===
On 18 October 2024 he signed for [[Barrow Raiders|Barrow]] in the RFL Championship on a two-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Barrow Raiders|date=18 Oct 2024|accessdate=25 Oct 2024|title=Ellis Robson becomes third new addition for 2025|url=https://www.barrowrlfc.com/latest-news/ellis-robson-becomes-third-new-addition-for-2025/}}</ref>
